elements.original_description: A stressed man in a blue shirt sits at a messy desk, surrounded by piles of papers and a clock showing 11:59. His hands are in his hair, eyes wide with panic. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a stressed man in a blue shirt sitting at a messy desk, surrounded by piles of disorganized papers. A clock on the desk shows 11:59. The man has his hands in his hair, eyes wide with panic and desperation. Cinematic lighting with dramatic shadows and a desaturated, tense color palette. High resolution, sharp focus, and a sense of urgency. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A calendar with crossed-out dates and scribbled notes, lying on the desk next to a spilled coffee cup. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a calendar with crossed-out dates and chaotic scribbled notes, lying on a desk next to a spilled coffee cup. Soft bokeh in the background, detailed focus on the calendar and cup to convey clutter and disorganization. Natural, dim lighting to emphasize a sense of neglect. High resolution, realistic textures. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A close-up of the man’s face, his mouth open as he shouts, with a thought bubble showing a chaotic to-do list. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a close-up of a man's face, mouth open wide as he shouts in frustration. Above his head, a thought bubble shows a chaotic, messy to-do list with scribbled lines and marks. Cinematic lighting to highlight his intense expression and the thought bubble, with shallow depth of field to blur the background. High resolution, sharp focus on the face and bubble, conveying panic and overwhelm. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A stack of unpaid bills and a red overdue stamp on a letter, placed on the edge of the desk. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a stack of unpaid bills and a letter with a red overdue stamp, placed on the edge of a wooden desk. Soft bokeh background, detailed focus on the bills and stamp to emphasize urgency and neglect. Dramatic, moody lighting with shadows to create a tense atmosphere. High resolution, realistic textures of paper and ink. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
